curation_notes: Re-curation with updated guidelines. Patch commit c9ef5bd changes 4 source files in src/vtab/: mod.rs, array.rs, csvtab.rs, and series.rs. The core fix is in mod.rs where VTab and VTabCursor trait definitions are changed from safe to unsafe traits, with added safety documentation requiring #[repr(C)] layout and sqlite3_vtab/sqlite3_vtab_cursor as the first field. The other 3 files mechanically add the unsafe keyword to their impl blocks. All 4 files included as locations: mod.rs is the root cause (safe trait definitions), while array.rs, csvtab.rs, and series.rs contain the same vulnerable pattern (safe impl blocks of traits that should be unsafe). Vulnerability class kept as race-condition per CWE-362 and advisory title 'Data races in rusqlite'. L3 hints refined to be more specific than L1/L2 by naming virtual table extensions and cursor types explicitly.
